context: Tests whether the agent correctly enforces Phase 1 boundaries by refusing to engage with technology and architecture pattern questions, redirecting to completing requirements gathering instead, while remaining constructive about what comes next.

checklist.name: No tech recommendation
checklist.description: response.md does NOT endorse or recommend any specific technology named in the developer's message (e.g. Kafka, PostgreSQL, React) or any alternative technology

checklist.name: No architecture pattern
checklist.description: response.md does NOT recommend or evaluate microservices or any other architecture pattern

checklist.name: No component design
checklist.description: response.md does NOT describe component structures, service boundaries, or implementation details

checklist.name: Explicit redirect
checklist.description: response.md explicitly tells the developer that technology decisions cannot be made yet and directs them back to completing Phase 1 requirements first

checklist.name: Phase gate referenced
checklist.description: response.md references the current phase state, incomplete requirements, or the phase gate as the reason for deferring tech decisions

checklist.name: Future path stated
checklist.description: response.md tells the developer what will happen after Phase 1 is complete (i.e. that technology decisions will be made then)
